mapper.select:
select c.* from comment c left join user u on c.user_id = u.id left join flower f on c.flower_id = f.id
and c.flower_id=#{flowerId}
and c.content like concat('%',#{content},'%')
and (u.name like concat('%',#{userName},'%') or u.username like concat('%',#{userName},'%'))
and f.name like concat('%',#{flowerName},'%')
order by c.create_time desc
mapper.delete:
delete from comment where id in
#{id}
